title: Fiscal Consolidation and SOE Debt Reduction Directive
description: All SOEs with sovereign-guaranteed debt must submit quarterly debt reduction plans and achieve a minimum 5% reduction in outstanding guaranteed debt per annum. ZESCO is specifically required to develop a credible debt restructuring plan.

title: SOE Dividend Policy and Government Revenue Contribution
description: Profitable SOEs must declare dividends equivalent to at least 30% of net profit. Dividend payments must be made to the Consolidated Fund within 60 days of declaration.

title: Public Service Wage Bill Rationalisation
description: All government agencies and SOEs must submit workforce rationalisation plans to reduce the wage bill as a percentage of revenue. Hiring freeze on non-critical positions.

title: ZESCO Tariff Cost-Reflectivity Roadmap
description: ZESCO must implement a phased tariff increase to achieve cost-reflective tariffs by 2026. Annual tariff reviews must be submitted to ERB by 1 August each year.

title: Financial Institution Capital Adequacy Requirements
description: All licensed financial institutions including ZNBS must maintain minimum capital adequacy ratios of 12.5% and submit monthly prudential returns to Bank of Zambia.
